name: @borjie/org-scope
description: Org Hierarchy + Terminology (Wave 18X) — the foundation layer for multi-level organisational scoping. Provides org-unit tree builder + ancestry/descendant resolvers, user-scope binding resolution, per-tenant + per-org-unit terminology overrides over a 40+ entry default catalogue, and a scoped-MD factory that parametrises Mr. Mwikila per scope. Implements docs/DESIGN/ORG_HIERARCHY_TERMINOLOGY_SPEC.md.
